about me

Hi, I'm Emily!
I'm a designer, UCLA Bruin, and Bay Area native, with an endless love for all things creative…
Expand to learn more about me

As a designer…
As a creative…
As an explorer…
As a matcha lover…

Outside of design, you'll find me in the ceramics studio, baking salt bread, crocheting a new cardigan, or just searching for inspiration in everyday moments! I believe that chasing creativity and constant learning keeps my perspective fresh and helps me design with greater curiosity, intention, and empathy.

emily jeng
